title: prunus × lannesiana f. multiplex
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. multiplex is a hybrid of the Prunus lannesiana and Prunus mume, commonly known as the 'Multiplex Flowering Cherry' or 'Yumei Cherry'. This deciduous shrub or small tree is valued for its vibrant pink flowers and edible fruit, but more notably for its traditional use in herbal medicine. Prunus × lannesiana f. multiplex is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The fruit and flowers of this plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and other medicinal preparations, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of its use.
